subcodes.first_line: O remnant of that noble soul! Praise be to God that the son hath taken on his father's nature, and the scion hath followed the ways of his illustrious sire [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یادگار آن بزرگوار حمد خدا را که پسر خوی پدر گرفت و سلیل روش اب جلیل یافت
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @love of God, @praise and encouragement, @nearness to God, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
